---
title: "Inclusive Facilitation Tutorials"
---

The below tutorials are all focused on facilitation and team science topics. See sub-headings for more specifics!

## David Kantor's Four Player Model

This slide deck includes:

- Brief background on the four player model
- Explanation of major components
- Identification of some "stuck" communication patterns and suggestions for how to resolve them

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides_four-player-model.html" height="420" width="750" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```

Four Player Model Slides -- [Full Screen](slides_four-player-model.qmd)
